# admanager_network (Data Source)

Reads the Google Ad Manager [network](https://developers.google.com/ad-manager/api/beta/reference/rest/v1/networks) the provider is configured for (via `network_code` or the `ADMANAGER_NETWORK_CODE` environment variable). Takes no arguments; every attribute is read from the API. A common use is looking up `effective_root_ad_unit` to parent top-level ad units.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Reads the network the provider is configured for. Takes no arguments.
data "admanager_network" "current" {}

# A common use: parent a top-level ad unit under the network's root ad unit
# without hardcoding the root's resource name.
resource "admanager_ad_unit" "homepage" {
  parent_ad_unit = data.admanager_network.current.effective_root_ad_unit
  display_name   = "Homepage"
}

output "network_currency" {
  value = data.admanager_network.current.currency_code
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `currency_code` (String) The primary currency code, in ISO 4217 format (e.g. `USD`).
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the network.
- `effective_root_ad_unit` (String) The resource name of the top-most ad unit, to which all other ad units descend: `networks/{network_code}/adUnits/{ad_unit_id}`. Use it as the `parent_ad_unit` of a top-level `admanager_ad_unit`.
- `id` (String) The full resource name of the network: `networks/{network_code}`.
- `network_code` (String) The network code.
- `network_id` (String) The numeric network ID.
- `property_code` (String) The property code. Null when the network has none.
- `secondary_currency_codes` (List of String) Currency codes that can be used as an alternative to the primary currency. Empty when the network has none.
- `test_network` (Boolean) Whether this is a test network. Acceptance tests refuse to run against a network where this is `false`.
- `time_zone` (String) The time zone associated with the delivery of orders and reporting (e.g. `America/Sao_Paulo`).
